ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city or village */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city or village */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Geographic location of the city (latitude and longitude) */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county (e.g., ROS, CRA, LIC, GEA) */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Geographic location of the county (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the accident type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic accident */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city where the accident occurred */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the accident occurred */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the accident occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the accident occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the accident (text description) */,
  "fatal_crashes" INTEGER /* Number of fatal crashes */,
  "injury_crashes" INTEGER /* Number of injury crashes */,
  "pdo_crashes" INTEGER /* Number of property damage only (PDO) crashes */,
  "total_crashes" INTEGER /* Total number of crashes */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths resulting from the accident */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries resulting from the accident */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "geom" TEXT /* Geographic location of the accident (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_accidents_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_accidents_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_accidents_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES accident_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, law enforcement) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic accident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the traffic accident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the traffic accident was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the traffic accident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES traffic_accidents ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_county" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* ID of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id", "county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic accident */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the traffic accident occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_years_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES traffic_accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_types_hierarchy" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accident type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent accident type (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_types_hierarchy_parent_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_type_id") REFERENCES accident_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_accident_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic accident */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the note was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_accident_notes_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES traffic_accidents ("accident_id")
)
